diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -23,8 +23,30 @@
         out = self.relu(out + residual)  # Add residual connection

         return out

 

+class AttentionLayer(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, dim):

+        super(AttentionLayer, self).__init__()

+        self.query = nn.Linear(dim, dim // 4)

+        self.key = nn.Linear(dim, dim // 4)

+        self.value = nn.Linear(dim, dim // 4)

+        self.softmax = nn.Softmax(dim=-1)

+        self.out_proj = nn.Linear(dim // 4, dim)

+        

+    def forward(self, x):

+        Q = self.query(x)

+        K = self.key(x)

+        V = self.value(x)

+        

+        attention_scores = torch.matmul(Q, K.transpose(-2, -1)) / (K.size(-1) ** 0.5)

+        attention_weights = self.softmax(attention_scores)

+        

+        attended_values = torch.matmul(attention_weights, V)

+        output = self.out_proj(attended_values)

+        

+        return output

+

 class StockReturnPredictor(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, input_dim=158, hidden_dims=[512, 512, 256, 256, 128], dropout_rate=0.1):

+    def __init__(self, input_dim=158, hidden_dims=[512, 512, 256, 256, 128, 128], dropout_rate=0.1):

         super(StockReturnPredictor, self).__init__()

         

         layers = []

@@ -57,6 +79,12 @@
             prev_dim = curr_dim

             i += 1

         

+        # Add attention layer

+        layers.append(AttentionLayer(prev_dim))

+        layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(prev_dim))

+        layers.append(nn.ReLU())

+        layers.append(nn.Dropout(dropout_rate))

+        

         # Output layer for single return prediction

         layers.append(nn.Linear(prev_dim, 1))
